The CryptoQuant API delivers on-chain, market, exchange flow, and miner metrics for Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other major cryptocurrencies. Endpoints return time-series data covering exchange inflows/outflows, supply, miner reserves, derivatives, network indicators, and stablecoin metrics. Authentication uses API key in the Authorization header.
